title: I Wanna Music
description: A mod allowed you to play music on netease music in minecraft.
body:
Ever wished you could listen to your favorite NetEase Cloud Music tracks while exploring the vast Minecraft world? Well, I Wanna Music is here to make that dream come true for you =^•ω•^=

### What Can This Mod Do?

This mod brings the entire NetEase Cloud Music experience right into your Minecraft game. You can search for songs, play them, create playlists, and even share music with your friends. It's like having a music player that follows you wherever you go in the game ^⌯𖥦⌯^ ੭

**Core Features:**

- Play music from NetEase Cloud Music directly in-game
- Search for songs using keywords (supports Chinese and English)
- Display lyrics in real-time with optional translation
- Create and manage your own playlists
- Join music parties with friends and listen together
- Adjust volume and control playback (pause, skip, repeat)
- Cache your favorite songs for offline playback
- Beautiful HUD showing current song info and progress

### Tech Stack

This mod is built with:
- Java 17 - The programming language ^•͈༝•^ฅ
- JLayer - For MP3 decoding
- Gson - For JSON parsing

### Mod Configuration

The configuration file is located at `config/iwm-client.toml` in your game directory (>^ω^<). You can customize the following settings to your liking:

- `bossbarEnabled` - Controls whether to show the song info HUD, enabled by default
- `lyricsDisplayMode` - Lyrics display mode, choose from off, chat box, or ActionBar display
- `lyricsTranslateEnabled` - Whether to enable lyrics translation, supports bilingual display
- `DEFAULT_VOLUME` - Default playback volume, range is 0-100

All settings are automatically saved and will be loaded the next time you start the game (=^-ω-^=)

### Installation Tips

Great news! This mod is designed to work in client-side only mode, which means you can install it and enjoy music on most servers without needing the server to have the mod installed too ヽ(=^･ω･^=)丿

**How it works:**

- **Client-only mode**: Install only on your client → Basic music features work perfectly (play, search, lyrics, playlists) 
- **Both client and server**: Install on both sides → Full social features enabled (party, sharing, sync) ٩(^ᴗ^)۶

So don't worry about server compatibility! You can bring your music player anywhere ฅ(≧▽≦)ฅ

### How It Works

The mod integrates with the NetEase Cloud Music API to fetch songs, lyrics, and other content. It uses a custom audio player that can stream music directly into your game. The social features work through server-side packet synchronization, so everyone in the party hears the same thing at the same time (˶˃ ᵕ ˂˶)✧

### Why Make This Mod?

Because music makes everything better, especially when you're building, mining, or fighting mobs in Minecraft (˘▾˘~). I wanted to create something that lets players enjoy their music without leaving the game. Plus, the social features make it perfect for hanging out with friends ( ˘ ³˘)♥

So go ahead, give it a try and let the music accompany you on your Minecraft adventures~o( =∩ω∩= )m

### Future Plans

If you have any good ideas or suggestions, feel free to let me know (=^.^=). Looking forward to making this mod better together with you!

---

有没有想过在探索广阔的 Minecraft 世界时，能够听到自己喜欢的网易云音乐呢？I Wanna Music 就是来帮你实现这个愿望的喵~ =^•ω•^=

### 这个模组能做什么？

这个模组把整个网易云音乐的体验直接带到了你的 Minecraft 游戏里。你可以搜索歌曲、播放音乐、创建歌单，甚至可以和朋友一起分享音乐。就像是一个随身携带的音乐播放器，无论你在游戏世界的哪个角落都能听歌 ^⌯𖥦⌯^ ੭

**核心功能：**

- 在游戏中直接播放网易云音乐
- 使用关键词搜索歌曲（支持中文和英文）
- 实时显示歌词，支持翻译功能
- 创建和管理自己的歌单
- 加入歌房和朋友一起听歌
- 调节音量和控制播放（暂停、切歌、循环）
- 缓存喜欢的歌曲供离线播放
- 美观的 HUD 显示当前歌曲信息和进度条

### 技术栈

这个模组使用了以下技术：
- Java 17 - 编程语言 ^•͈༝•^ฅ
- JLayer - 用于 MP3 解码
- Gson - 用于 JSON 解析

### 模组配置

配置文件位于游戏目录下的 `config/iwm-client.toml` 文件中 (>^ω^<)，你可以根据自己的喜好调整以下设置：

- `bossbarEnabled` - 控制是否显示歌曲信息 HUD，默认开启
- `lyricsDisplayMode` - 歌词显示模式，可以选择关闭、聊天框显示或 ActionBar 显示
- `lyricsTranslateEnabled` - 是否开启歌词翻译，支持双语显示
- `DEFAULT_VOLUME` - 默认播放音量，范围是 0-100

所有配置都会自动保存，下次启动游戏时会自动加载你的设置 (=^-ω-^=)

### 安装小提示

好消息！这个模组设计为可以在仅客户端模式下工作，这意味着你只需要在客户端安装就可以在大部分服务器上享受音乐啦，不需要服务器也安装这个模组喵~ ヽ(=^･ω･^=)丿

**工作方式是这样的：**

- **仅客户端安装**: 只在你的客户端安装 → 基础音乐功能完美可用（播放、搜索、歌词、歌单）喵~
- **客户端和服务端都安装**: 两端都安装 → 社交功能全部启用（歌房、分享、同步）٩(^ᴗ^)۶

所以不用担心服务器兼容性问题哦，你可以把音乐播放器带到任何地方 ฅ(≧▽≦)ฅ

### 工作原理

模组通过网易云音乐 API 获取歌曲、歌词和其他内容。它使用自定义音频播放器可以直接将音乐流式传输到游戏中。社交功能通过服务端数据包同步实现，所以歌房里的所有人都能同时听到一样的音乐 (˶˃ ᵕ ˂˶)✧

### 为什么要制作这个模组？

因为音乐让一切变得更美好，尤其是当你在 Minecraft 里建造、挖矿或者和怪物战斗的时候 ~o( =∩ω∩= )m。我想创造一个让玩家不用离开游戏就能享受音乐的东西。加上社交功能，让它非常适合和朋友一起玩 ( ˘ ³˘)♥

所以快去试试吧，让音乐陪伴你在 Minecraft 中的冒险之旅 (つ´ω`)つ

### 未来计划

如果你有什么好的想法或建议，欢迎随时告诉我哦(=^.^=)期待和你一起让这个模组变得更好！
